title: Cyclopogon oliganthus
taxonomy: Cyclopogon oliganthus is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. Cyclopogon oliganthus belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Cyclopogon oliganthus is classified under the subfamily Spiranthoideae. This subfamily is further divided into several genera, with Cyclopogon being one of them. The specific classification of Cyclopogon oliganthus reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.
uses: Cyclopogon oliganthus, a species of orchid, has been reported to possess medicinal properties.
